commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the Ollama stream converter and tests so replayed assistant tool calls and tool results retain matching OpenAI/Ollama-compatible IDs.

Reproducibility: yes. for the converter-level failure from source inspection: current main drops assistant tool-call IDs and tool result IDs during Ollama message conversion. I did not establish a live provider reproduction in this read-only review.
